name: Server-Authoritative Sample v1
decision_reason: StarterArena has one bounded socket-free server-authoritative smoke using existing AuthoritativeMovementCore. The smoke records server-owned state, one accepted input, one rejected invalid input, one authoritative snapshot, and explicit non-claims. Full multiplayer gameplay, MMO-scale networking, Visual Blocks, editor workflow, package output, distribution output, and maintainer verification remain absent.
